meaning: n.[医]苯丙酮尿,苯丙酮酸尿症(一种先天性代谢异常)
examples: Objective to report the bone X ray changes in phenylketonuria.
Objective to study the method for gene diagnosis of phenylketonuria.
Objective to establish a simple, accurate and rapid method for screening of the mutant genes in phenylketonuria.
The main phenylketonuria treatment is a strict diet with very limited intake of phenylalanine, which is mostly found in foods containing protein.
